props.open_message: The Glim Sight — a yellow lens cut from listening glass. Hold it up and the hidden things stop hiding.

root.speaker: Veiled Stone
root.text: *A faint hum, like wind through stone…*

hint_pre.speaker: Veiled Stone
hint_pre.text: What you cannot see is still there. The Lens shows what hides between the lines.

hint_post.speaker: Veiled Stone
hint_post.text: Now you may face the Censor. Walk where ink dares not.
